name: jmeter-ecs-workflow
definition: {"StartAt":"ReadConfig","States":{"ReadConfig":{"Next":"FilterExecutableTests","Retry":[{"ErrorEquals":["Lambda.ClientExecutionTimeoutException","Lambda.ServiceException","Lambda.AWSLambdaException","Lambda.SdkClientException"],"IntervalSeconds":2,"MaxAttempts":6,"BackoffRate":2}],"Type":"Task","ResultPath":"$.configResult","Resource":"arn:aws:states:::lambda:invoke","Parameters":{"FunctionName":"arn:aws:lambda:us-east-1:623035187488:function:jmeter-ecs-read-config","Payload.$":"$"}},"FilterExecutableTests":{"Type":"Pass","Parameters":{"tests.$":"$.configResult.Payload.testSuite[?(@.execute==true)]","runId.$":"$$.Execution.Name"},"Next":"ParseJMX"},"ParseJMX":{"Type":"Map","ResultPath":"$.testsWithConfig","Next":"TransformParsedTests","ItemsPath":"$.tests","MaxConcurrency":5,"Iterator":{"StartAt":"ParseJMXFile","States":{"ParseJMXFile":{"End":true,"Retry":[{"ErrorEquals":["Lambda.ClientExecutionTimeoutException","Lambda.ServiceException","Lambda.AWSLambdaException","Lambda.SdkClientException"],"IntervalSeconds":2,"MaxAttempts":6,"BackoffRate":2}],"Catch":[{"ErrorEquals":["States.ALL"],"ResultPath":"$.error","Next":"ParseJMXFailed"}],"Type":"Task","ResultSelector":{"Payload.$":"$.Payload"},"Resource":"arn:aws:states:::lambda:invoke","Parameters":{"FunctionName":"arn:aws:lambda:us-east-1:623035187488:function:JMeterEcsStack-JmxParserJmxParserFunction06D3C1EE-tDPnqmu2UCnv","Payload":{"testScript.$":"$.testScript","testId.$":"$.testId","testType.$":"$.testType","execute.$":"$.execute","configBucket":"jmeter-framework-config","enableDatadog.$":"$.enableDatadog","datadogSite.$":"$.datadogSite"}}},"ParseJMXFailed":{"Type":"Fail","Error":"JMXParseError","Cause":"Failed to parse JMX file"}}}},"TransformParsedTests":{"Type":"Pass","Parameters":{"tests.$":"$.testsWithConfig[*].Payload","runId.$":"$.runId"},"Next":"PartitionData"},"PartitionData":{"Next":"TransformPartitionedData","Retry":[{"ErrorEquals":["Lambda.ClientExecutionTimeoutException","Lambda.ServiceException","Lambda.AWSLambdaException","Lambda.SdkClientException"],"IntervalSeconds":2,"MaxAttempts":6,"BackoffRate":2}],"Type":"Task","ResultPath":"$.partitionResult","Resource":"arn:aws:states:::lambda:invoke","Parameters":{"FunctionName":"arn:aws:lambda:us-east-1:623035187488:function:jmeter-ecs-partition-data","Payload.$":"$"}},"TransformPartitionedData":{"Type":"Pass","Parameters":{"tests.$":"$.partitionResult.Payload.tests","runId.$":"$.runId"},"Next":"SubmitTasks"},"SubmitTasks":{"Next":"WaitForReady","Retry":[{"ErrorEquals":["Lambda.ClientExecutionTimeoutException","Lambda.ServiceException","Lambda.AWSLambdaException","Lambda.SdkClientException"],"IntervalSeconds":2,"MaxAttempts":6,"BackoffRate":2}],"Type":"Task","ResultPath":"$.tasksResult","Resource":"arn:aws:states:::lambda:invoke","Parameters":{"FunctionName":"arn:aws:lambda:us-east-1:623035187488:function:jmeter-ecs-submit-tasks","Payload.$":"$"}},"WaitForReady":{"Type":"Map","ResultPath":"$.syncResult","Next":"CheckTasks","Parameters":{"test.$":"$$.Map.Item.Value","runId.$":"$.tasksResult.Payload.runId"},"ItemsPath":"$.tasksResult.Payload.tasks","MaxConcurrency":5,"Iterator":{"StartAt":"WaitForReadyPerTest","States":{"WaitForReadyPerTest":{"End":true,"Retry":[{"ErrorEquals":["Lambda.ClientExecutionTimeoutException","Lambda.ServiceException","Lambda.AWSLambdaException","Lambda.SdkClientException"],"IntervalSeconds":2,"MaxAttempts":6,"BackoffRate":2}],"Type":"Task","ResultSelector":{"Payload.$":"$.Payload"},"Resource":"arn:aws:states:::lambda:invoke","Parameters":{"FunctionName":"arn:aws:lambda:us-east-1:623035187488:function:jmeter-ecs-wait-for-ready","Payload":{"runId.$":"$.runId","testId.$":"$.test.testId","taskArns.$":"$.test.taskArns","expectedTaskCount.$":"$.test.numContainers","clusterArn":"arn:aws:ecs:us-east-1:623035187488:cluster/jmeter-framework-cluster","configBucket":"jmeter-framework-config"}}}}}},"CheckTasks":{"Next":"TasksDone?","Retry":[{"ErrorEquals":["Lambda.ClientExecutionTimeoutException","Lambda.ServiceException","Lambda.AWSLambdaException","Lambda.SdkClientException"],"IntervalSeconds":2,"MaxAttempts":6,"BackoffRate":2}],"Type":"Task","ResultPath":"$.checkResult","Resource":"arn:aws:states:::lambda:invoke","Parameters":{"FunctionName":"arn:aws:lambda:us-east-1:623035187488:function:jmeter-ecs-check-tasks","Payload.$":"$"}},"Wait":{"Type":"Wait","Seconds":60,"Next":"CheckTasks"},"TasksDone?":{"Type":"Choice","Choices":[{"Variable":"$.checkResult.Payload.allTasksComplete","BooleanEquals":true,"Next":"MergeResults"},{"Variable":"$.checkResult.Payload.anyTasksFailed","BooleanEquals":true,"Next":"TasksFailed"}],"Default":"Wait"},"MergeResults":{"Next":"Success","Retry":[{"ErrorEquals":["Lambda.ClientExecutionTimeoutException","Lambda.ServiceException","Lambda.AWSLambdaException","Lambda.SdkClientException"],"IntervalSeconds":2,"MaxAttempts":6,"BackoffRate":2}],"Type":"Task","ResultPath":"$.mergeResult","Resource":"arn:aws:states:::lambda:invoke","Parameters":{"FunctionName":"arn:aws:lambda:us-east-1:623035187488:function:jmeter-ecs-merge-results","Payload":{"tasks.$":"$.tasksResult.Payload.tasks","runId.$":"$.runId"}}},"Success":{"Type":"Succeed"},"TasksFailed":{"Type":"Fail","Error":"EcsTasksFailure","Cause":"One
